case_title: KATZ MICHAEL VS CITY TOW CLAIMS DEPT.-ROSEMARY FONG

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KATZ MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY TOW CLAIMS DEPT.-ROSEMARY FONG $245.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $253.00, COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT IS ONLY LIABLE FOR DAMAGE TO SWAY BAR IN THE AMT OF $245.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-19-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-23-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
